cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.intro: Cookies are small files saved on your phone, tablet or computer when you visit a website.
cookies.essentialIntro: We use essential cookies to make this form work.
cookies.essentialBody: Essential cookies keep your information secure. We do not need to ask your permission to use them.
cookies.analyticsBody: We use Google Analytics software to understand how people use our forms. We do this to help make sure the site is meeting the needs of its users and to help us make improvements.
cookies.changeSettingsBody: You can change which cookies you're happy for us to use.

session.expires: When you close the browser, or after [[sessionDurationPretty]]

crumb.purpose: Ensures forms can only be submitted from this website

ga.purpose: Used by Google Analytics to help us count how many people visit our forms by tracking if you've visited before

gaSession.purpose: Used by Google Analytics to find and track an individual session with your device

cookiePreferences.title: Cookies
cookiePreferences.heading: Change your cookie settings
cookiePreferences.analyticsQuestion: Do you want to accept analytics cookies?

accessibilityStatement.title: Accessibility statement
accessibilityStatement.heading: Accessibility statement for this form
accessibilityStatement.intro: This accessibility statement applies to online forms with a URL that starts with https://submit-forms-to-defra.service.gov.uk.
accessibilityStatement.technicalHeading: Technical information about this website's accessibility
accessibilityStatement.technicalBody: Defra is committed to making its forms accessible, in accordance with the Public Sector Bodies (Websites and Mobile Applications) (No. 2) Accessibility Regulations 2018.
accessibilityStatement.complianceBody: Forms created by Defra are fully compliant with the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) version 2.2 AA standard.
accessibilityStatement.howAccessibleIntro: This section lists accessibility issues with content found in Defra forms.
accessibilityStatement.nonComplianceBody: Defra forms do not have accessibility issues that fail the WCAG 2.2 accessibility regulations.
accessibilityStatement.outOfScopeHeading: Content that's not within the scope of the accessibility regulations
accessibilityStatement.outOfScopeIntro: The accessibility issues listed in this section do not fail the accessibility regulations. We plan to fix them as soon as possible.
outOfScopeItems: Forms do not default to a dark or light theme based on the 'prefers-color-scheme'.
The email field allows for the entry of values that are not formatted as an email address.
The summary screen for each form does not display the question asked. Instead, it displays a summarised version of the question.
Some optional questions are not marked as optional.
Section titles in some forms are formatted as H2 level headings. These headings are shown before page titles which are formatted as H1 level headings (skipped heading hierarchy).
accessibilityStatement.preparationBody1: This statement was prepared on 24 June 2024. It was last reviewed on 14 March 2025.
accessibilityStatement.preparationBody2: The Defra Accessibility team tested 2 online forms against the WCAG 2.2 AA standard on 17 June 2024. The tests were done using automated testing tools.
accessibilityStatement.preparationBody3: We will commission a full accessibility audit of forms created by Defra before June 2025.
accessibilityStatement.feedbackBody: If you find any problems not listed on this page or think we're not meeting accessibility requirements, email the Defra Forms team on defraforms@defra.gov.uk.
accessibilityStatement.enforcementBody: The Equality and Human Rights Commission (EHRC) is responsible for enforcing the Public Sector Bodies (Websites and Mobile Applications) (No. 2) Accessibility Regulations 2018 (the 'accessibility regulations'). If you're not happy with how we respond to your complaint, contact the Equality Advisory and Support Service (EASS).

privacyNotice.heading: [[serviceName]] - privacy notice
privacyNotice.intro: The [[formTitle]] form was created using the [[serviceName]] service. This service is owned and operated by the Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs (Defra).
privacyNotice.whoCollectsBody1: The organisation that created the [[formTitle]] form using [[serviceName]] is the controller of personal data they collect. If the controller is outside the Defra legal entity, then Defra is the processor.
privacyNotice.whoCollectsBody2: Read the specific privacy notice for the [[formTitle]] form.
privacyNotice.whoCollectsBody3: Defra also collects some data as a controller. This privacy notice explains what personal data Defra collects and processes as a controller through forms made with [[serviceName]].
privacyNotice.whoCollectsBody4: If you need further information about how Defra uses your personal data, email defraforms@defra.gov.uk.
privacyNotice.whoCollectsBody5: If you want information and your associated rights you can email: data.protection@defra.gov.uk.
privacyNotice.whoCollectsBody6: The data protection officer for Defra is responsible for checking that Defra complies with legislation. You can contact them at DefraGroupDataProtectionOfficer@defra.gov.uk.
privacyNotice.dataWeCollectHeading: Data we collect from you and what we do with it
privacyNotice.analyticsBody1: If you give your consent, we use Google Analytics cookies to collect information about how you use [[serviceName]]. Read the data privacy and security policy for Google Analytics.
analyticsItems: how long you spend on each [[serviceName]] page
how you got to the site
what you select while you're visiting the site
privacyNotice.analyticsBody3: Defra will make sure you cannot be directly identified by Google Analytics data. We do this by using Google Analytics' IP address anonymisation feature and by removing any other personal data from the titles or URLs of the pages you visit.
privacyNotice.analyticsBody4: Defra will not combine analytics information with other data sets in a way that would directly identify who you are.
privacyNotice.systemLogsBody1: We use system logs to collect information about the usage of forms.
privacyNotice.systemLogsBody2: We use the system logs to create anonymised reports about the performance of forms that use [[serviceName]]. We use this data to improve forms, for example, if we discover a high number of incomplete forms.
privacyNotice.systemLogsBody2WithAnalytics: We use the system logs and Google Analytics data to create anonymised reports about the performance of forms that use [[serviceName]]. We use this data to improve forms, for example, if we discover a high number of incomplete forms.
privacyNotice.feedbackBody: If you email us feedback about a form that uses [[serviceName]], we'll send your email address and any other personal information you choose to include in your email to the controller for review. The controller may use your personal data to reply to your query to update a form based on your feedback where it is appropriate.
privacyNotice.saveAndReturnHeading: Save and return to a form
privacyNotice.saveAndReturnBody: You can save your form progress and return within [[saveAndExitExpiryDays]] days. When saving your progress, you need to tell us:
saveAndReturnItems: the security question you want to answer
the answer to the security question
privacyNotice.lawfulBasisHeading: Lawful basis for processing your personal data
privacyNotice.lawfulBasisBody: The lawful basis for processing your personal data is your consent.
privacyNotice.cookiesBody: We use cookies to make this form work. Read about the cookies we use to make this form work.
privacyNotice.howLongHeading: How long we keep your data
privacyNotice.howLongBody: [[serviceName]] will store your data for [[storeCompletedApplicationsFor]] for completed applications and [[saveAndExitExpiryDays]] days if you save and exit and do not submit an application.
privacyNotice.feedbackStorageBody: Any feedback you provide is stored for [[storeFeedbackFor]].
privacyNotice.transferHeading: Transfer of your personal data outside of the UK
privacyNotice.transferBody: We will only transfer your personal data to another country that is deemed adequate for data protection purposes.
privacyNotice.rightsIntro: Based on the lawful processing above, your individual rights are:
rightsItems: rights in relation to automated decision making and profiling
privacyNotice.rightsBody: Get more information about your individual rights under the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018 (DPA 2018).
privacyNotice.complaintsBody: You have the right to make a complaint to the Information Commissioner's Office at any time.
privacyNotice.personalInfoBody: Our personal information charter explains more about your rights over your personal data.

details.intro1: Provide your email address and answer a security question to save your progress for 28 days.
details.intro2: We will email you with a link you can use to return to the form later. You will be asked for the answer to the security question when you resume your form.
details.warning: Enter your email address carefully. You cannot return to the form later if your email is incorrect.
details.emailHint: Use the email address you want the link to go to
details.emailConfirmationHint: Check you have entered the correct email address
details.securityQuestionLegend: Choose a security question to answer
details.securityAnswerLabel: Your answer to the security question

securityQuestions.memorablePlace: What is a memorable place you have visited?
securityQuestions.characterName: What is the name of your favourite character from a story or TV show?
securityQuestions.audioRecommendation: What album or song do you always recommend to others?

validation.emailFormat: Enter an email address in the correct format, for example, hello@example.com
validation.emailUnicode: The email address you entered includes invalid characters, for example, long dashes
validation.emailConfirmation: Your email address does not match. Check and try again.
validation.securityQuestionRequired: Choose a security question to answer
validation.securityAnswerRequired: Enter an answer to the security question
validation.securityAnswerLength: Your answer must be between 3 and 40 characters long
validation.invalidPassword_one: Your answer is incorrect. You have [[count]] attempt remaining.
validation.invalidPassword_other: Your answer is incorrect. You have [[count]] attempts remaining.
validation.stateExpired: Your information is no longer available. Return to the start of the form.

confirmation.linkSent: We have sent a link to [[email]] which you can use to resume this form within [[saveAndExitExpiryDays]] days.
confirmation.repeatSave: If you want to save your progress again after resuming your form, you will need to repeat the save process to generate a new link.
confirmation.checkSpam: Check your spam folder if you have not received an email after a few minutes.

resumeError.body1: The link we emailed to you has expired or is invalid. Your information will be securely deleted.
resumeError.body2: You will need to start the form again.

resumeErrorLocked.heading: You cannot resume your form
resumeErrorLocked.incorrectAnswer: The answer to your security question was incorrect [[maxPasswordAttempts]] times. You have run out of attempts to resume your form.
resumeErrorLocked.startAgain: You will need to start the form again. Your information will be securely deleted.

resumeSuccess.body1: You will return to the page where you saved your progress unless new questions have been added to the form.
resumeSuccess.warning: If new questions have been added to the form, you will be taken to the earliest new question.
resumeSuccess.body2: You will need to repeat the save process again and generate a new link if you want to save your progress in the future.

resumePassword.body1: Enter the most recent security answer to your security question to retrieve your information and continue with your form.
resumePassword.attemptsLeft: You have [[attemptsLeft]] attempts to enter the correct answer.
resumePassword.warning: To save progress again, you will need to repeat the save process and generate another link.

confirmation.feedbackLink: What do you think of this service? (takes 30 seconds)
confirmation.submissionGuidance:
Thank you for leaving feedback.

You can close this screen now.

paymentField.pendingTransaction: Mae'n bosibl y gwelwch drafodiad ar y gweill yn eich cyfrif banc ond dim ond pan fyddwch yn cyflwyno'r ffurflen y codir tâl arnoch.
paymentField.cannotTakePayment: Mae problem ac ni allwn dderbyn taliad. Cysylltwch â ni (manylion yn nhroedyn y ffurflen hon) neu cadwch eich cynnydd a dychwelyd at y ffurflen yn ddiweddarach.
paymentField.testApiKey: Ychwanegwch allwedd API prawf ddilys cyn i chi allu rhagolwg y daith talu.
paymentField.paymentExpired: Mae awdurdodiad eich taliad wedi dod i ben. Ychwanegwch eich manylion talu eto.
paymentField.submissionFailed: Roedd problem ac ni chyflwynwyd eich ffurflen. Ceisiwch gyflwyno'r ffurflen eto.
paymentField.canSubmitAfterPayment: Gallwch gyflwyno'r ffurflen ar ôl i chi ychwanegu eich manylion talu.
paymentField.preAuthorisedTitle: Rydych eisoes wedi awdurdodi taliad ar gyfer y ffurflen hon
paymentField.preAuthorisedBody: Parhewch i gyflwyno'r ffurflen. Ni chodir tâl arnoch ddwywaith.
paymentField.paymentAmountMismatch: Mae swm y taliad a rhaganrhuddhawyd rywsut yn wahanol i'r hyn a ofynnwyd amdano. Ceisiwch ychwanegu manylion talu eto.

fileUploadField.uploadFailed: Roedd problem gyda'ch ffeiliau a uwchlwythwyd. Uwchlwythwch nhw eto cyn cyflwyno'r ffurflen.
